title: Borodinia laevigata
taxonomy: Borodinia laevigata is classified within the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. This family is part of the larger order Brassicales, which consists of flowering plants that produce four-petaled flowers. Borodinia laevigata's classification is further supported by its shared characteristics with other members of the Brassicaceae family.
